testcase.classname: userSummaryService period helpers calendarWeekRangeFromAnchor: semana lunes–domingo que contiene un martes
testcase.name: userSummaryService period helpers calendarWeekRangeFromAnchor: semana lunes–domingo que contiene un martes

testcase.classname: userSummaryService period helpers isWithinWeeklyNarrativeLlmWindow: true dentro de 36h por defecto
testcase.name: userSummaryService period helpers isWithinWeeklyNarrativeLlmWindow: true dentro de 36h por defecto

testcase.classname: userSummaryService period helpers isWithinWeeklyNarrativeLlmWindow: false fuera de ventana
testcase.name: userSummaryService period helpers isWithinWeeklyNarrativeLlmWindow: false fuera de ventana

testcase.classname: resolveWeeklyTipsMailEnv usa sunday_morning por defecto cuando no viene slot
testcase.name: resolveWeeklyTipsMailEnv usa sunday_morning por defecto cuando no viene slot

testcase.classname: resolveWeeklyTipsMailEnv sunday_morning usa domingo 10h UTC por defecto
testcase.name: resolveWeeklyTipsMailEnv sunday_morning usa domingo 10h UTC por defecto

testcase.classname: resolveWeeklyTipsMailEnv monday_morning usa lunes 10h UTC y ventana hasta :59
testcase.name: resolveWeeklyTipsMailEnv monday_morning usa lunes 10h UTC y ventana hasta :59

testcase.classname: resolveWeeklyTipsMailEnv saturday_night usa sábado 23h UTC por defecto
testcase.name: resolveWeeklyTipsMailEnv saturday_night usa sábado 23h UTC por defecto

testcase.classname: resolveWeeklyTipsMailEnv permite sobrescribir la hora del slot
testcase.name: resolveWeeklyTipsMailEnv permite sobrescribir la hora del slot

testcase.classname: matchesWeeklyTipsUtcWindow domingo 10:05 UTC con slot sunday_morning
testcase.name: matchesWeeklyTipsUtcWindow domingo 10:05 UTC con slot sunday_morning

testcase.classname: matchesWeeklyTipsUtcWindow sábado 23:05 UTC con slot saturday_night
testcase.name: matchesWeeklyTipsUtcWindow sábado 23:05 UTC con slot saturday_night

testcase.classname: matchesWeeklyTipsUtcWindow false fuera de hora de ventana (domingo 11h UTC, slot 10h)
testcase.name: matchesWeeklyTipsUtcWindow false fuera de hora de ventana (domingo 11h UTC, slot 10h)

testcase.classname: matchesWeeklyTipsUtcWindow domingo 10:55 UTC sigue dentro de ventana sunday_morning (:59)
testcase.name: matchesWeeklyTipsUtcWindow domingo 10:55 UTC sigue dentro de ventana sunday_morning (:59)

testcase.classname: matchesWeeklyTipsUtcWindow false otro día con slot sunday_morning
testcase.name: matchesWeeklyTipsUtcWindow false otro día con slot sunday_morning
